2026-02-27T01:45:22.0428591Z Post job cleanup.
2026-02-27T01:45:22.1234891Z [command]/usr/bin/git version
2026-02-27T01:45:22.1272492Z git version 2.53.0
2026-02-27T01:45:22.1307397Z Copying '/home/runner/.gitconfig' to '/home/runner/work/_temp/16648a30-b44d-4010-b7f3-88211dca8936/.gitconfig'
2026-02-27T01:45:22.1316412Z Temporarily overriding HOME='/home/runner/work/_temp/16648a30-b44d-4010-b7f3-88211dca8936' before making global git config changes
2026-02-27T01:45:22.1317800Z Adding repository directory to the temporary git global config as a safe directory
2026-02-27T01:45:22.1322803Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --global --add safe.directory /home/runner/work/coding/coding
2026-02-27T01:45:22.1351409Z Removing SSH command configuration
2026-02-27T01:45:22.1358145Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --local --name-only --get-regexp core\.sshCommand
2026-02-27T01:45:22.1390848Z [command]/usr/bin/git submodule foreach --recursive sh -c "git config --local --name-only --get-regexp 'core\.sshCommand' && git config --local --unset-all 'core.sshCommand' || :"
2026-02-27T01:45:22.1584789Z Removing HTTP extra header
2026-02-27T01:45:22.1591157Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --local --name-only --get-regexp http\.https\:\/\/github\.com\/\.extraheader
2026-02-27T01:45:22.1624401Z [command]/usr/bin/git submodule foreach --recursive sh -c "git config --local --name-only --get-regexp 'http\.https\:\/\/github\.com\/\.extraheader' && git config --local --unset-all 'http.https://github.com/.extraheader' || :"
2026-02-27T01:45:22.1810928Z Removing includeIf entries pointing to credentials config files
2026-02-27T01:45:22.1818537Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --local --name-only --get-regexp ^includeIf\.gitdir:
2026-02-27T01:45:22.1848609Z [command]/usr/bin/git submodule foreach --recursive git config --local --show-origin --name-only --get-regexp remote.origin.url
